definitions: To maintain a resentful or defiant attitude, often due to a perceived grievance or sense of inferiority.
To be easily angered or looking for a fight because of past mistreatment.
examples: He has a chip on his shoulder about being passed over for the promotion.
Ever since he lost the game, he's had a chip on his shoulder.
lemma: have a chip on one's shoulder
source: have a chip on one's shoulder
